why_winner: The split-screen hook puts the central contrast in the reader's face in the first two lines — same idea the story and claim variants take paragraphs to reach. The 'Understand → Do → Review' framework is the clearest articulation of the 3-agent pattern across all three drafts, and the parallel structure of the two real-project examples makes the architecture immediately graspable. Performance context also favors comparison framing.

runner_up_notes.B: The phrase 'The handoff is what makes it a system' is the best single-line insight across all three drafts — it names the mechanism, not just the result. Worth grafting into C.
runner_up_notes.A: The 'None of them know the goal. Together, they achieve it.' line captures emergent system behavior in a way C doesn't — strong authenticity hit.
